title: Camping List + Roommate Rent Split (Aug 2025)
html:
TL;DR

  • Apple Note from 2025-08-22 — one day after the Austin goodbye + packlist — combines a brief 6-item camping kit list with a 2-line rent-split agreement: Yahir takes the porch room at $750, roommate pays $825.
  • First in-corpus confirmation of the Austin rent structure: Yahir's room costs $750/month, sub-market for an Austin apartment, paired with the porch-room asymmetry (he takes the smaller / less-private space for the lower rent).
  • Implies a last-camping-trip-before-Austin as a parting ritual with the Grants Pass / Oregon crew before the move executed in early September.
  • Pairs with the goodbye list (Tío Edgar, Las Dobles As, Grandpa Eddie, Kai, GSmitty, Vicente Palencia) as the operational T-minus-2-weeks layer of the Austin move.
  • Pure specimen: two unrelated logistical concerns sharing one note because Yahir was thumbing them in within minutes of each other.

Notes

The list, in source order:

  • Paper utensils
  • Paper plates
  • Knife
  • Blankets
  • Food in fridge / freezer
  • Wood

Then a divider (an attached image marker ￼), then:

  • "I'll take porch room"
  • "Pay $750"
  • "You pay $825"

The camping kit is sparse — 6 items, no tent, no stove, no water — suggesting either (a) a short trip / drive-to spot where most gear is already on-site, or (b) a list of things Yahir is responsible for, not the full kit. The "food in fridge / freezer" entry implies cleaning out his place before leaving.

The rent split is the load-bearing data: $750 + $825 = $1,575 total apartment rent in Austin starting September 2025. That's a ~$1,575 2BR, which puts them in the affordable-but-not-cheap West Campus / North Loop / South Austin band. The porch-room asymmetry is also worth tagging — Yahir taking the structurally weaker room to save $75/month is consistent with the bridge income discipline visible across late 2025 (NaviWell, Shef, the gym overnight shift).

The Aug 21 → Aug 22 sequencing matters: the goodbye/packlist is the emotional prep ("I am also accepting the reality that my mom will have limited time in Austin"); this note is the transactional prep. They form a 24-hour pair.

Connections
